this_title: The Rise of the Red Hot Chili Peppers: Our Brother, Hillel
trans_title: 红辣椒乐队成名路：好兄弟希勒
introduction: The film centers on the deep childhood bond between Anthony Kiedis, Flea, and original guitarist Hillel Slovak—charting their early experimentation, the band’s unruly formation, and the sonic chaos that defined their first three albums. The film features exclusive new interviews with Kiedis, Flea, John Frusciante, Jack Irons and George Clinton, and others.
chinese_title: 红辣椒乐队成名路：好兄弟希勒
foreign_title: The Rise of the Red Hot Chili Peppers: Our Brother, Hillel
